events.title: Departure day !!
events.description: Finally ready for the big trip :)

events.title: Late night dinner @ County 6 | Bar & Grill
events.description: Dinner at the dive bar: County 6 | Bar & Grill. Super nice people and dart playing :)

events.title: Getting to our first dispersed camping
events.description: First evening on the road :)

events.title: First night on the road - right next to a train crossing !!!
events.description: Do not ever let Emilie pick the night spot :)

events.title: Lunch @ Jimmy John's
events.description: Good sandwiches & nice people who were very happy to meet folks speaking french !

events.title: A long day of driving is starting
events.arrival: 1657 Skyline Dr, South Ogden, UT 84405

events.title: Relaxing evening @ Luck Peak Dam in Boise
events.description: Spending a wonderful at the recreation site of Luck Peak Dam @ Boise, Idaho. However cannot sleep there... found the hard way at the last minute :(

events.title: Flying to Idaho !

events.title: BLM near Boise, ID
events.description: Struggling to find a place to park for the night after getting kicked out of the recreation site at the dam.

events.title: Struggling to find a campsite for the night
Superb dinner @ Salty's on Alki Beach
events.description: Enjoyed the 4th of July fireworks from the bay

events.title: Driving like hell to Seattle !
events.description: Long day of driving to get to the coast
events.arrival: 1936 Harbor Ave SW, Seattle, WA 98126

events.title: Movie time: The Minions & Monsters
events.description: @ AMC South Center 16

events.title: Motel in Town: FairBridge Inn Express Tukwila
events.description: Very meh

events.title: Din Tai Fung !!!
events.description: The biggest Din Tai Fung Ever - no wait ! Was perfect ;)
events.diningAddress: 1132 Alberni St, Vancouver, BC V6E 1A5, Canada

events.title: Crossing into Vancouver, Canada
events.description: Breakfast at Ihop, picking up stuff (groceries, etc.) and crossing the border with a thorough inspection of the van !
events.arrival: 295 Tomahawk Ave, West Vancouver, BC V7P 0C1, Canada

events.title: Visiting Vancouver in a uber
events.description: Nice stroll in Vancouver
events.sightseeingAddress: Beach Ave, Vancouver, BC V6C 3C1, Canada

events.title: Capilano RV Park
events.description: Nice RV Park in the middle of Vancouver

events.title: Evening stroll in Stanley Park
events.description: Nice brewery ! Stanley Park Brewing Restaurant & Brewpub

events.title: First day of work on the road !
events.description: Discovery of the issue with the Van and the app alerts. Looking for a Ford Dealership

events.title: Getting to the only Ford Dealership in Vancouver that would see us on the stop !
events.description: Cam Clark Ford Richmond for the win ! Nice lady just ran a diagnostic and told us there is nothing to worry about, it's just the app hallucinating !
events.departure: 295 Tomahawk Ave, West Vancouver, BC V7P 0C1, Canada
events.arrival: 13580 Smallwood Pl, Richmond, BC V6V 2C1, Canada

events.title: Walking the SeaWall in Stanley Park
events.description: Enjoying Vancouver after the stressful Van situation
events.sightseeingAddress: 5601 Stanley Park Dr, Vancouver, BC V6G 3H5, Canada

events.title: Driving back up North !
events.departure: 13580 Smallwood Pl, Richmond, BC V6V 2C1, Canada
events.arrival: 5601 Stanley Park Dr, Vancouver, BC V6G 3H5, Canada

events.title: First provincial recreational areas
events.description: Cal Cheak Recreation Site along the Seat to Sky Highway

events.title: Getting out of the best West Coast Cities !
events.description: Absolutely Stunning Driver through the Sea to Sky highway !
events.departure: 5601 Stanley Park Dr, Vancouver, BC V6G 3H5, Canada
events.arrival: Cal-cheak Recreation Site, Whistler

events.title: Marble Canyon Provincial Park
events.description: Long conversation with the Park operator about how we built our van :) After a Motorcycle recon drive with Charlotte in the mountain - fun :)
events.sleepingAddress: Marble Canyon Provincial Park, #1, Pavilion, BC V0K 2H0, Canada

events.title: Back on the Sea to Sky Highway
Hump Day !
events.description: Working for the parent, fishing and kayaking for Charlotte

events.title: North Recreation Site @ Blue Lake
events.description: Very remote & free :)
events.sleepingAddress: Blue Lake North Rec Site, Blue Lake Rd, Williams Lake, BC V0K 2G0, Canada

events.title: Working working...
events.description: While the parents are working Charlotte has managed to fish 22 trouts !!

events.title: Free remote but busy Rec site @ Cobb Lake
events.description: Cobb Lake Recreation Site was surprisingly full when accessible only after a 6 miles dirt road!

events.title: Quite a bit of driving after a full day of work !
Last day of working before VACATION!
Uh oh... big noise on the right front wheel, let's find a mechanic!
events.description: Blackbeard Small Engine, 5743 Stella Rd, Fraser Lake, BC V0J 1S0, Canada

events.title: Mechanic Repairs
events.description: ~2h to find the stuck bolt, take apart the Brake Rotor and put it back together with a new bolt. Super nice dude ! #thanksFord

events.title: 'Ksan Campground - what a view!
events.description: Nice that we have daylight in the late hours of the night now...

events.title: Back on the road, no more horrible screeching sound :)
events.arrival: 1450 Ksan Rd, 'Ksan, BC V0J 1Y0, Canada

events.title: Improvised lunch in Hyder Alaska !
events.description: Everything is closed... we could only buy some yummy fudges, so we made sandwiches in the van on the parking lot of the only thing opened in town: the bar!
events.diningAddress: Glacier Inn, International St, Hyder, AK 99923

events.title: Made it into Alaska !!
events.description: Easiest American boarder we've even been through, not even a passport check !

events.title: Oh my god - Salmon Glacier viewpoint !!!
events.description: Wow, just wow... 20km of dirt road to go there, but so worth it ! Stopped at the Fish Creek Wildlife Observation Site where we saw the few first salmon going up river of the season. Bear will start to feed soon !
events.sightseeingAddress: Granduc Rd, Stewart, BC V0T 1W0, Canada

events.title: Dancing with the Canada/USA boarder
events.arrival: Granduc Rd, Stewart, BC V0T 1W0, Canada

events.title: Meziadin Lake provincial Campground
events.description: Very nice provincial campground. Meet some chatty Québécois that are still mad at Denver for stealing the Avalanche team (formerly "Les Nordics"). Hockey Fanatics Am I right ?!
events.sleepingAddress: Meziadin Lake provincial Campground, Meziadin Junction, BC V0J 3S0, Canada

events.title: And back to Canada because Hyder is literally a dead-end :)
events.description: Easy enough Canadian border ! No vam inspection this time !
events.departure: Granduc Rd, Stewart, BC V0T 1W0, Canada
events.arrival: Meziadin Lake provincial Campground, Meziadin Junction, BC V0J 3S0, Canada

events.title: Impromptu Lasagne lunch in the Van, because the next restaurant was 137km away!
events.description: Such a nice little spot along the road, quiet, in front of the water, met French folks who spent the night and were successfully fishing... Emie & Charlotte, not so much :P

events.title: On the road again...
events.description: Got a lot of distance to cover today, need to reach the Alaskan Highway before nightfall.
events.departure: Meziadin Lake provincial Campground, Meziadin Junction, BC V0J 3S0, Canada

events.title: Driving to Good Hope Lake
events.description: Or is it Aeroplane lake !? (if we believe the local sign)

events.title: Disperse Camping near Good Hope Lake
events.description: Super nice spot, 3 distinct zone to camp, meet some moto camper  who took the north site. Took out the motorcycle and the Kayaks ! No luck fishing though. Lots of dry dead wood to build a nice camp fire!

events.title: Super early departure towards Chilkoot river
events.description: Decided to not got to Skagway (because no Ferries on Monday !?) and take the long drive around through White Horse to Haines.
events.arrival: 90343 Alaska Hwy, Whitehorse, YT Y1A 7A1, Canada

events.title: Nice lunch at the Wolf's Den
events.description: The Yukon Motorcycle Park Inc.'s Restaurant
events.diningAddress: 90343 Alaska Hwy, Whitehorse, YT Y1A 7A1, Canada

events.title: Finally getting into "proper Alaska"
events.description: Hoping to find a spot in the famous Chilkoot river campground where bear feed on salmons. Super disappointed because the recreation site was closed, so we found something a few miles away.
events.departure: 90343 Alaska Hwy, Whitehorse, YT Y1A 7A1, Canada
events.arrival: Salmon Run RV Campground, Haines, AK

events.title: Chilkoot River Campground
events.description: Famous place to see wildlife (Bear & Eagle) feast on Salmon going up to their native river. Didn't see any bears :( But fished our first fish (and baby salmon) with a fly fishing rod! Spend the day at the Chilbkoot rec site dishing, kayaking, nice dinner on the fire pit next to the lake. Sunk the drone in the lake though :(
events.sleepingAddress: Salmon Run RV Campground, Haines, AK

events.title: Laundry !
events.description: Laundromat in Haines

events.title: Departing of Anchorage! Got 2 days to make the 14h trip!
events.description: Departed much later than anticipated because of the laundry, gotta make time... but got stuck at a travel site for like 30 minutes and got inspected at the US border - again! (Don't bring American firewood in Canada!)
events.departure: Salmon Run RV Campground, Haines, AK
events.arrival: Village Bakery and Deli, 116 Auriol St, Haines Junction, YT Y0B 1L0, Canada

events.title: Nice break at the Haines Junction Bakery
events.description: Very nice and cosy place, recomanded !
events.diningAddress: Village Bakery and Deli, 116 Auriol St, Haines Junction, YT Y0B 1L0, Canada

events.title: Dinner on the road at Buckshot Betty's
events.description: The only place on a 150 miles stretch! Not the best and the waitress was also the host, the cook, the cashier and the motel attendant! Took a while :)
events.diningAddress: Buckshot Betty's Motel & Restaurant, 121949 Alaska Hwy, Beaver Creek, YT Y0B 1A0, Canada

events.title: Anchorage is far...
events.description: Oh man that road is a disaster - a literal roller dusty coaster !
events.departure: Village Bakery and Deli, 116 Auriol St, Haines Junction, YT Y0B 1L0, Canada
events.arrival: Buckshot Betty's Motel & Restaurant, 121949 Alaska Hwy, Beaver Creek, YT Y0B 1A0, Canada

events.title: Another 2h to go our stop for the night: Tok River
events.description: Easy passage through the US customs, learned about bear bangers!
events.departure: Buckshot Betty's Motel & Restaurant, 121949 Alaska Hwy, Beaver Creek, YT Y0B 1A0, Canada
events.arrival: Tok River State Recreation Site Access Rd, Tok, AK 99780

events.title: Tok River Rec Site
events.description: or maybe dispersed close by ?
events.sleepingAddress: Tok River State Recreation Site Access Rd, Tok, AK 99780

events.title: Eureka Roadhouse
events.description: Historical Roadhouse - founded in the late 1800s !

events.title: Last stretch to Anchorage!
events.departure: Tok River State Recreation Site Access Rd, Tok, AK 99780
events.arrival: Eureka Roadhouse, Matanuska-Susitna Borough

events.title: Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center
events.description: Wild life !
events.sightseeingAddress: Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center, Seward Highway

events.title: Through Anchorage… didn’t even stop (yet)!
events.arrival: Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center, Seward Highway

events.title: Sleeping in a pull-out along the Seward Highway - very noisy!
events.description: Definitely DO NOT let Emilie pick the sleepingspots…

events.title: Simon & Seafort's Saloon & Grill
events.description: Very nice (not cheap) seafood restaurent in the Anchorage bay with a view ;)
events.diningAddress: Simon & Seafort's Saloon & Grill, 420 L St, Anchorage, AK 99501

events.title: Let’s get some nice seafood !
events.description: Finally heading downtown Anchorage where half of the Alaskan population resides!
events.departure: Alaska Wildlife Conservation Center, Seward Highway
events.arrival: Simon & Seafort's Saloon & Grill, 420 L St, Anchorage, AK 99501

events.title: Let’s find a place to sleep for the night
events.description: Emilie chose the spot!
events.departure: Simon & Seafort's Saloon & Grill, 420 L St, Anchorage, AK 99501

events.title: 26 Glacier Cruise boat ride!
events.description: Not the greatest wether, but we’ll make due!

events.title: Let’s get to Whittier!
events.description: Had to get to the tunnel before 10:30am as we’re sharing it with trains and oncoming traffic, well scheduled!
events.arrival: 100 W Camp Rd, Whittier, AK 99693

events.title: Whittier Alaska Bay Campground
events.description: Basically a parking lot, but fine enough to be flat and unbothered for the night!

events.title: Driving to Talkeetna
events.description: Little pause on the road to make sandwiches and see France get their asses handed to them by the British!
events.arrival: Talkeetna, Matanuska-Susitna Borough

events.title: Nice little spot on BLM land
events.description: Super nice little spot off the highway to Denali. Found some deadwood and made a nice fire! Charlotte discovered a new fun activity!

events.title: Talkeetna!
events.description: Very nice and touristic little town, plenty of gift shop and nice pubs! Nice Photography Gallery full of Aurora Borealis photos: Aurora Dora

events.title: Denali National Park
events.description: Such a wonderful and well maintained National Park. Did the Savage River Alpine Trail. Breathtaking views, but steep climb and very windy! On the way back we stopped at the sled dog kennel to pet the new puppies ;)
events.sightseeingAddress: Savage River Checkpoint, Park Rd, Healy, AK 99743

events.title: Going to Denali!
events.arrival: Savage River Checkpoint, Park Rd, Healy, AK 99743

events.title: Tatlanika Gift Shop and Campground
events.description: Couldn’t locate a BLM in our direction, found a nice little campground next to the river, we’ll refill water and empty the gray water !
events.sleepingAddress: Tatlanika Gift Shop and Campground, Parks Highway, Healy, AK

events.title: Finding a place to sleep on the way to Fairbanks
events.departure: Savage River Checkpoint, Park Rd, Healy, AK 99743
events.arrival: Tatlanika Gift Shop and Campground, Parks Highway, Healy, AK

events.title: Getting to the north-est most city of the trip: Fairbanks
events.departure: Tatlanika Gift Shop and Campground, Parks Highway, Healy, AK
events.arrival: Fairbanks, Fairbanks North Star Borough

events.title: Pioneer Park in Fairbanks
events.description: Very nice little park with food, historical museum like expos, was a great quite break and the occasion to eat a huge ice cream :)
events.sightseeingAddress: Pioneer Park, 2300 Airport Way, Fairbanks, AK 99701

events.title: Tok River State Recreation Site
events.description: Little state dry campground for the night, a bot too close to the highway, but it will do, it’s cheap.

events.title: Starting the way back… after being as north as we could!
events.arrival: Tok River State Recreation Site, 1309
